headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Ready To Go? Nvidia, Micron, Sandisk Near Buy Points With Big Earnings Due
summary: Taiwan Semi, Goldman and GE Aerospace are big earnings due with the market improving. Nvidia, Sandisk, Micron, Robinhood are near buy points.

headline: Robinhood, AI Plays Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: Robinhood Markets and a pair of resurgent AI infrastructure plays, Dell Technologies and Cisco Systems, lead this weekend's watchlist of five stocks near buy points.  Joining HOOD and AI stocks DELL and CSCO are two IRL (in real life) stocks.  Outfront Media, a real estate investment trust, focuses on billboard and transit advertising, while Match Group operates Tinder and other dating sites.
